scripts.prebuild: node scripts/clear-astro-cache.mjs && node scripts/aiki-pre-publish-check.cjs && node scripts/aiki-pre-publish-check.cjs --all && node scripts/fetch-news-og.mjs && node scripts/gen-news-og-fallback.mjs && node scripts/gen-wiki-og.mjs
scripts.validate:content: node scripts/aiki-prune-news.cjs && node scripts/aiki-generate-wiki.cjs && node scripts/clear-astro-cache.mjs && node scripts/aiki-sync-news-factcheck.cjs && node scripts/aiki-pre-publish-check.cjs && node scripts/aiki-pre-publish-check.cjs --all && node scripts/aiki-wiki-quality-gate.cjs --dry-run && node scripts/aiki-report-wiki-candidates.cjs
scripts.generate:wiki: node scripts/aiki-generate-wiki.cjs && node scripts/clear-astro-cache.mjs && node scripts/aiki-wiki-quality-gate.cjs --fix --dry-run
